records.period_evidence: "Reported operating income in the first quarter was $399 million" — read alongside surrounding context ("Consolidated revenues were $2.9 billion... in the quarter", comparisons to "the first quarter of 2025" and "raising our full-year 2026 guidance") confirms this is Q1 2026 (quarter ended 2026-03-31), the target period.

records.quote: In the third quarter, we delivered revenue of $60 million, down 4% year-over-year, adjusted EBITDA of $18.9 million, reflecting a 32% margin, and adjusted net income was $9.7 million, resulting in 7 cents of non-GAAP earnings per share in the period, all of which were at or above the high end of our guidance for the quarter.
